title: Alloteropsis paniculata
taxonomy: Alloteropsis paniculata is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to South America. This plant is a member of the subfamily Panicoideae. The genus Alloteropsis is part of the tribe Paniceae. Alloteropsis paniculata is a type of panic grass that belongs to the monocotyledonous flowering plants.
